nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-backed woodswallow
nodes.summary: White-backed woodswallow（Artamus insignis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-backed woodswallow。

nodes.name: Artamus
nodes.summary: Artamus（Artamus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如灰燕鵙、Fiji woodswallow、Ivory-backed woodswallow等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-backed woodswallow
nodes.summary: The white-backed woodswallow (Artamus insignis) or Bismarck woodswallow, is a species of bird in the family Artamidae. It is endemic as its name suggests, to the Bismarck Archipelago (Papua New Guinea). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
